name: callout
title: Callout
description: Dismissible alert box with semantic variants, auto-generated icons, and compound component architecture.

content.text: Callout compound components must be used within a Callout
Adds live-region semantics. Error callouts are alerts by default.

callout-custom-icon.raw:
import { Callout, CalloutIcon, CalloutTitle, CalloutContent } from "@/components/ui/callout" export default function CalloutCustomIcon() { return (
? Custom Icon Pass any content as children to CalloutIcon to replace the default character. ★ Featured Icons can be any single character, emoji, or React node.
) }

content.text: Pass any content as children to CalloutIcon to replace the default character.
Icons can be any single character, emoji, or React node.
This is an informational callout with a title and body text.

callout-variants.raw:
import { Callout, CalloutIcon, CalloutTitle, CalloutContent, CalloutDismiss } from "@/components/ui/callout" export default function CalloutVariants() { return (
Info Informational message with helpful details. Success Operation completed successfully. Warning Please review before proceeding. Error Something went wrong. Please try again. Inline Layout: Everything in one row that wraps when needed. Dismissible Click the dismiss button to close this callout.
) }

content.text: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Everything in one row that wraps when needed.
Click the dismiss button to close this callout.

docs.description: Dismissible alert box with semantic variants, auto-generated icons, and compound component architecture.

anatomy.name: Callout
anatomy.note: Root (manages visibility state, provides variant context)

anatomy.name: CalloutIcon
anatomy.note: Variant icon with default characters (overridable via children)

notes.title: Compound Components
notes.content: Use CalloutIcon, CalloutTitle, CalloutContent, and CalloutDismiss as children. Each part inherits the variant from the root Callout component via context.

notes.title: Layout
notes.content: Use the layout prop to control arrangement: 'column' (default) places icon on the left with title and content stacked vertically; 'inline' places everything in a single row that wraps when needed; 'none' removes all layout styles for full custom control. Note: with layout='none', sub-components still emit grid-column positioning classes (col-start-1, col-start-2, etc.) which are inert outside a grid parent but may need overriding if you set your own grid.

notes.title: Default Icons
notes.content: Each variant has a default icon character: info='i', warning='!', error='✕', success='✓'. Pass children to CalloutIcon to override with any ReactNode.

notes.title: Dismissible
notes.content: Add CalloutDismiss as a child to show a close button. In uncontrolled mode the callout self-dismisses. For controlled mode, pass visible and onVisibleChange to the root Callout.

notes.title: Accessibility
notes.content: Defaults to role='note' (static supplementary content). Override with role='alert' when the callout appears dynamically and needs to interrupt screen readers. Do not use role='alert' for callouts present on page load.
